description_long: This object is a vintage-style radio receiver with a rectangular body, predominantly white on the front and black on the back and sides. The front face features a large circular tuning dial with red and gold accents, surrounded by a series of numbers indicating radio frequencies. There are several red buttons on the top surface, likely for power and tuning functions, and a horizontal grille pattern covering the speaker area. The back is solid black with no visible controls or openings, while the sides are slim and bordered in black. The overall design is compact and portable, suitable for placement on a table or shelf in an urban environment.
description: A compact, vintage-style radio receiver with a white front, black sides and back, a large circular tuning dial, and red control buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white grille, large circular tuning dial with red and gold details, and a small red button below.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the slim black-bordered profile and the tops of red control buttons.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid black surface with no visible features or controls.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, highlighting the slim profile and red button tops.
